name: lark-search
title: Lark Search
description: Search Feishu/Lark docs, messages, chats, and contacts from Raycast.
author: jyufu_ko

commands.name: search-lark
commands.title: Lark Search
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Search Feishu/Lark docs, messages, chats, and contacts from Raycast.

commands.name: refresh-hot-index
commands.title: Refresh Lark Root Search
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Refresh local Lark shortcuts for Raycast Root Search.

commands.name: setup-hot-index
commands.title: Set up Lark Root Search
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Create the local Lark shortcuts folder and show setup instructions.

preferences.name: appTarget
preferences.title: Application Target
preferences.description: Choose which desktop app Lark Search should use.

preferences.name: larkCliIdentity
preferences.title: Lark-cli Identity
preferences.description: Identity passed to lark-cli --as when searching Lark.

preferences.name: feishuCliIdentity
preferences.title: Feishu Lark-cli Identity
preferences.description: Identity passed to lark-cli --as when searching Feishu.

preferences.name: hotIndexDirectory
preferences.title: Root Search Shortcut Folder
preferences.description: Choose where Lark Search writes shortcut files for Raycast Root Search.

preferences.name: hotIndexLimit
preferences.title: Root Search Shortcut Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of local shortcuts shown in Raycast Root Search.
